Variable.Name: GVL.nModuleStatus
Variable.Description: Module status byte: 0x00=OFF, 0x01=ON, 0x11=Fault

Variable.Name: GVL.nModuleVoltage
Variable.Description: Output voltage (V) – already scaled from 0.1 V/bit

Variable.Name: GVL.nModuleCurrent
Variable.Description: Output current (A) – already scaled from 0.01 A/bit

Variable.Name: GVL.wModuleFaults
Variable.Description: Fault / Warning bit-field (WORD mapped to UINT)

Variable.Name: GVL.nModulePfcFaults
Variable.Description: PFC fault status byte

Variable.Name: GVL.bModuleFault
Variable.Description: Global fault flag (set by ProcessRxMessage / M_C_4)

Variable.Name: GVL.bModuleStatusReceived
Variable.Description: TRUE when a fresh M_C_1 status frame has been received

Variable.Name: GVL.bAckReceived
Variable.Description: TRUE when M_C_2 acknowledgment frame has been received

Variable.Name: GVL.nPhaseVoltageA
Variable.Description: AC input A-phase voltage (V)

Variable.Name: GVL.nPhaseVoltageB
Variable.Description: AC input B-phase voltage (V)

Variable.Name: GVL.nPhaseVoltageC
Variable.Description: AC input C-phase voltage (V)

Variable.Name: GVL.nAmbientTemperature
Variable.Description: Ambient temperature inside module (°C)

Variable.Name: GVL.wModuleStatusBits
Variable.Description: Detailed module status bit-field (bytes 1-2 of M_C_4)

Variable.Name: GVL.wModuleExtFaultWarningBits
Variable.Description: Extended fault / warning bit-field (bytes 3-4 of M_C_4)

Variable.Name: GVL.nRxFrameCount
Variable.Description: Total CAN frames received since PLC start

Variable.Name: GVL.nLastRxCobId
Variable.Description: CAN ID (COB-ID) of the last received frame

Variable.Name: MAIN.bStartModule
Variable.Description: Write TRUE to command module start (C_M_24 = 0xAA)

Variable.Name: MAIN.bStopModule
Variable.Description: Write TRUE to command module stop (C_M_24 = 0x55)

Variable.Name: MAIN.bClearFault
Variable.Description: Write TRUE to clear fault flags and reset state machine

Variable.Name: MAIN.bModuleRunning
Variable.Description: TRUE while state machine is in RUNNING state

Variable.Name: MAIN.sStatusText
Variable.Description: Human-readable state machine status message

Variable.Name: MAIN.nTargetVoltage
Variable.Description: Voltage setpoint (0.1 V/bit, e.g. 5000 = 500.0 V)

Variable.Name: MAIN.nTargetCurrent
Variable.Description: Current setpoint (0.01 A/bit, e.g. 4100 = 41.00 A)

Variable.Name: MAIN.bUpdateVI
Variable.Description: Write TRUE to push nTargetVoltage/nTargetCurrent to module

Variable.Name: MAIN.nModuleAddress
Variable.Description: Target module CAN address (1–240)

Variable.Name: MAIN.nMasterAddress
Variable.Description: Master controller address (fixed 0xA0 per TONHE protocol)

Variable.Name: MAIN.nRetryCount
Variable.Description: Current retry counter for start/stop acknowledgment

Variable.Name: MAIN.nMaxRetries
Variable.Description: Maximum permitted retries before transitioning to FAULT
